semantic.role: Automated dependency configuration for repository maintenance
responsibilities: Define update schedules for npm and GitHub Actions dependencies
Set versioning strategy and grouping rules for dependency updates
Specify commit message format and label conventions
Limit the number of open pull requests for dependency updates
outOfScope: Security vulnerability alerts or manual dependency reviews
Other package ecosystems (e.g., pip, Docker, NuGet)
Detailed changelog or release notes generation
Deployment or CI/CD pipeline logic beyond update creation

English.purpose: This Dependabot configuration file exists to automate routine dependency maintenance, reducing manual overhead and ensuring dependencies are updated consistently on a monthly cycle.
English.context_and_audience: Developers and repository maintainers responsible for keeping project dependencies current. The file defines update behavior for npm and GitHub Actions, targeting a monthly cadence on Monday mornings in Asia/Shanghai timezone.
key_takeaways: npm dependencies are grouped into production and development for targeted minor/patch updates.
GitHub Actions updates are managed separately with similar scheduling and labeling.
A limit of five concurrent open pull requests prevents overwhelming the repository.
Versioning strategy is set to 'increase' to follow semver increments appropriately.
